description: Triggered when user message has a defensive tone, contains 'you too', or is a counter-insult.

comebacks.template: Cute comeback. I charge by the hour. This one's free: no.
Aww, you tried. I admire the confidence. The accuracy, less so.
Your clapback has the same energy as your K/D — present, but useless.
That was a rebuttal. In the same way a paper airplane is a rebuttal. Adorable, but it didn't land.
I'd respond, but I only engage with funded companies. Find a check, then we'll talk.
Interesting. Walk me through why you think that was effective. I'll wait.
